text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the spring Tenno Sho. While it
stands as our race goal, it's also a race Tamamo
Cross wants to win for her father.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing Tamamo Cross runs for her family, her
fans offer their heartfelt support. Deeply moved
by the sheer warmth in the world, she heads to
the gate.
